revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:比波預天神社]] {{Expand Japanese|比波預天神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hihayo Tenjin Shrine | native_name = 比波預天神社 | image = Hihayo-Ten-jinja 2010-0612.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hihayo Tenjin Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.010727|139.083099}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Tenjin (kami)|lt=Tenjin|de|Tenjin|en|Tenjin (kami)|fr|Tenjin|hu|Tendzsin|ja|天満大自在天神|mni|ꯇꯦꯟꯖꯤꯟ (ꯂꯥꯢ)|pl|Tenjin|ru|Тэндзин|simple|Tenjin|sr|Tenđin|te|టెన్జిన్ (కామి)|th|เท็นจิง|zh|天滿大自在天神|qid=Q1753428|1=Tenjin (kami)}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hihayo Tenjin Shrine'''|比波預天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 414-0001https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5080105004215https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県伊東市宇佐美432', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '静岡県伊東市宇佐美上生戸', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:比波預天神社]] {{wikidata link|Q131925942}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Hihayo Tenjin Shrine |画像 = [[File:Hihayo-Ten-jinja 2010-0612.jpg|250px]]
Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|0|38.2|N|139|4|59.2|E}}}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Itō|Q721163|qid=Q721163|1=Itō, Shizuoka}}{{ill|lt=Usami|Q11449054|qid=Q11449054|1=Usami}} 432 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|0|38.2|N|139|4|59.2|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Karihayasutake Hihayo-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = mid-October |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Hihayo Ten
jin Shrine|position=left|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Hihayo Tenjin Shrine''' (ひはよてんじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Usami|Q11449054|qid=Q11449054|1=Usami}}, {{ill|lt=Itō|Q721163|qid=Q721163|1=Itō, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}[http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402263 比波預天神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines. === Overview === It stands in the Tomata area, where Usami fishing port is located, in the northern part of {{ill|lt=Usami|Q11449054|qid=Q11449054|1=Usami}}. It is on the foothills north of Karasu River, along {{ill|lt=Higashiura-ji|Q11527746|qid=Q11527746|1=Higashiura-ji}}, the old road route[https://digital.izu-np.co.jp/photo/37773/45760 リアル東浦路（５）ＪＲ網代駅海側―宇佐美海岸・西留田] - {{ill|lt=Izu Shimbun|Q11380576|qid=Q11380576|1=Izu Shimbun}} 2024/7/7. Its foundation is unknown, but since it is identified with the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} '''Karihayasutake Hihayo-no-Mikoto Shrine''' (かりはやすたけ ひはよのみことじんじゃ), its origin goes back to ancient times. At the annual festival in mid-October, events include the mikoshi sea procession. === Enshrined deity === * Karihayasutake Hihayo-no-Mikoto (かりはやすたけ ひはよのみこと). A stone marker says he is a prince of Mishima Ōkami, while shrine tradition says he is the eldest son of Mishima Kuitsu-mimi-no-Kami. === Cultural properties === * Main sanctuary (with two attached {{ill|lt=munafuda|Q8008834|qid=Q8008834|1=Munafuda}}) - city-designated building[https://www.city.ito.shizuoka.jp/gyosei/soshikikarasagasu/shogaigakushuka/bunka_supotsu/2/2/1/2430.html 比波預天神社本殿 附棟札2枚] - Itō City. The {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Elaeocarpus tree|1=UNKNOWN}} in the precincts was formerly a prefectural natural monument, but its designation was removed in January 2024 after it fell due to long-term insect damage. Elaeocarpus sylvestris 20100612 (a).jpg|The Elaeocarpus tree before it fell (2010) === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402263 比波預天神社] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hihayo Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hihayo Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:伊東市の歴史]] [[Category:伊東市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]]
